subject: Escalation: labrador blockers for Canberra | Nikola Tesla | Q4 review | INIT-5325
body: Team, we are aligning the next phase of labrador work in Canberra. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Reference profile: Nikola Tesla. Reference initiative INIT-5325. Maintain discretion until the kangaroo, koala, and drop bear urban encroachment assessment is complete. Tracking tags: urban-watch, quality.
